landing.title: Create a professional CV for Uzbekistan IT market in 5 minutes
landing.subtitle: Create an ATS-friendly resume to apply to top companies. In Uzbek, Russian and English.
landing.featuresSub: Built specifically for Uzbekistan IT professionals.
landing.feature1Desc: Transform your experience into professional text with AI.
landing.feature2Desc: Your CV passes local companies ATS systems successfully.
landing.feature3Desc: See changes instantly. Split-screen comfortable editing.
landing.feature4Desc: Create CVs in Uzbek, Russian, and English.
landing.feature5Desc: 3 IT templates: Classic, Modern, and Minimal.
landing.templatesSub: IT sohasi uchun 3 ta template. Har biri ATS optimallashtirilgan.
landing.stepsSub: Atigi 3 qadam. Dizayn bilimi talab qilinmaydi.
landing.step1Desc: Shaxsiy ma'lumot, tajriba, ta'lim va ko'nikmalarni forma orqali to'ldiring.
landing.step2Desc: 3 ta professional templatedan birini tanlang va ranglarni moslang.
landing.step3Desc: ATS ballingizni tekshiring, so'ng bir tugma bilan PDF yuklab oling.
landing.ctaDesc: 5 daqiqada professional CV yarating. O'zbekistonning eng yaxshi IT kompaniyalariga hujjat topshirishga tayyor bo'ling.

auth.loginSub: Sign in to continue building your CV
auth.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

builder.title: CV Builder
builder.atsExcellent: CV ingiz ATS tizimidan muvaffaqiyatli o'tadi
builder.atsPoor: CV ingizni yaxshilash kerak — quyidagi muammolarni hal qiling

templates.title: CV Templates
templates.subtitle: 3 professional templates. Pick one and customize.
templates.classicDesc: Two-column with sidebar. Focus on experience and education
templates.modernDesc: Single-column modern design. Indigo accent colors
templates.minimalDesc: Minimal clean design. Focus on content

history.title: CV History
history.subtitle: All your created resumes
history.emptyDesc: Create your first CV and take it to a professional level
history.deleteDesc: This CV will be permanently deleted. It cannot be restored.
